extortion.description: bk Group is the leading general contractor in Europe for interiorconstruction and technical facility management. They specialize in planning, building, and maintaining various types of projects,including retail stores, fitness centers, and automotive buildings.We will upload 89gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal files (passports, DLs, German IDs and so on), NDAs, contracts and agreements, financials, international projects, confidential files,and so on.
